prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双 一流高校；软科主榜2026年约第80名，近年排名稳中有升（82→83→83→83→79→80）；2026年声誉偏负面（学术不端事件）；2025年声誉偏负面（热门专业投档线 暴跌）；抖音热度一般（总排名第77）。整体报考热度无明显提振；管理科学与工程（A），为该校唯一A级学科；工科整体实力较强，机械、电气、计算机等专 业社会认可度高。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业持续高热，对物理类考生吸引力强；江西省2026年物理类考生数预计约26.6万（按近年约5 6%占比估算），与2025年基本持平；省控线2025年本科批429分，较2024年448分下降。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次异常暴跌后的反弹预期、2026年小幅扩招（+2.7%）及考 生总数基本持平，预计2026年物理类最低位次将较2025年略有前移；预测最低位次约23521名，区间23021-24021名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category (including Science) was approximately 11277 → 12297 → 10056 → 12711 → 23636. In 2025, the ranking significantly dropped by about 10925 places, indicating an abnormal fluctuation, with an expected rebound in 2026. Enrollment plans from 2021 to 2025 were 187, 187, 276, 182, and 184 respectively. The 2026 plan is 189 students, a slight increase of 5 students (+2.7%) compared to 2025, leading to a minor intensification of competition but limited in scope.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 and Double First-Class university. On the Soft Science main ranking, it is approximately 80th in 2026, with a stable upward trend in recent years (82→83→83→83→79→80). In 2026, its reputation is somewhat negative (due to academic misconduct incidents); in 2025, its reputation was also negative (due to a sharp drop in admission scores for popular majors). Its popularity on Douyin is average (ranked 77th overall). Overall, there is no significant boost in application enthusiasm. Management Science and Engineering (A) is its only A-level discipline. Its engineering strength is relatively strong, with high social recognition for majors like Mechanical, Electrical, and Computer Science.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering remain highly popular, strongly attracting Physics Category candidates. In 2026, the number of Physics Category candidates in Jiangxi Province is estimated to be about 266,000 (based on approximately 56% of total candidates in recent years), roughly the same as in 2025. The provincial control line for the undergraduate batch in 2025 was 429 points, down from 448 points in 2024.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the expected rebound after the abnormal drop in 2025 rankings, the slight enrollment expansion in 2026 (+2.7%), and the roughly stable total number of candidates, the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is expected to move slightly forward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 23521, with a range of 23021 to 24021.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking falls within the predicted range of 23021-24021, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 23000), you can prioritize competitive majors like Computer Science, Integrated Circuits, and Electrical Engineering. If your ranking is near the upper limit, be cautious when selecting Tier 1 majors and prioritize Tier 2 majors such as Automation and Vehicle Engineering.
